productName: Swifts Edibles - Truffle-Dubai Milk MAX-500mg - MAX THC:CBD:CBN - Vanilla Frosting - 120g
description: Luxurious chocolate made for slow savoring — deep cocoa, soft sweetness, and a cannabis infusion blended into the recipe like a secret ingredient passed down for generations. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest. The flavor does the inviting, and the cannabis infusion follows with a smooth finish.
